XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove the automatic downloading of the IP database from a remote URL, requiring the file to be present locally instead.
Migrate configuration loading from Spring Boot properties binding to a custom static method retrieving data from a system constant utility.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Removed @Component and @ConfigurationProperties; added static getXianYumConfig() using SystemConstantUtils.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Change the 'profile' field from static to instance variable to align with the new non-static configuration retrieval pattern.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Changed 'private static String profile' to 'private String profile' and updated static methods to use getXianYumConfig().getProfile().

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Changed the login type identifier from Integer to String to support alphanumeric codes.
Renamed getLoginType to getAccountType to better reflect the return value semantics.
Update static configuration access to use an instance-based getter method instead of a static method.
Changed the HTTP header name for token retrieval from 'token' to 'Authorization' to align with standard OAuth2 practices.
Changed the query parameter name for token retrieval from 'token' to 'access_token' to align with standard OAuth2 practices.
Migrate HTTP client library from com.ejlchina.okhttps to cn.zhxu.okhttps to align with JDK 21 ecosystem or library updates.
Switch message converter from Fastjson1 to Fastjson2 to support modern JSON processing standards.
Replace the old Spring-based IP service with a new IpSearcher configuration bean to handle IP geolocation.
XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.human_impl: Replaced `SpringUtils.getBean(IpService.class).getIpInfo(ip)` with `SpringUtils.getBean("ipSearcherConfig").search(ip)` and added parsing logic for the pipe-delimited result.

XianYumApi/xianyum-common/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add import for the new IpSearcher utility class used in the refactored IP lookup.
Add import for the custom SoException class used in the new error handling.
Add import for HashMap to support the new Map return type in IP info methods.
Add import for Map interface to support the new return type.
Add import for Objects utility to handle null checks in IP data parsing.
Remove import for the deprecated IpInfoEntity class.
Remove import for the deprecated IpService interface.
